title: Blade 16x
body:
# REQUIRES OPTIFINE

## ❓ What is it?
**Blade 16x** is a simple but high-quality Minecraft PVP pack, made for **1.8.9** Bedwars.

## 📦 Features: 
- Makes Swords take up less screen space.
- Custom Sky, Hotbar, etc.
- Reduces sizes of potions, golden apples, totems, and more.
- Compatible with versions 1.6.1-1.20.2.
- Compatible with Sodium and Optifine.
- Focuses mainly on Hypixel Bedwars/PVP
- Easy / Light and will not use many more resources.

## 🙋‍♂️ Questions:
### Does **Blade 16x** work with Shaders?
- Depends. If the Shaders change any textures, they will not work

### Am I allowed to use this pack in a video, live stream, or "post"?
- Yes, as long as you provide credit to the pack and the creators.

## 📜 Credits
- [ItsFlare](https://modrinth.com/user/itstheflare) for pack creation, design, and ownership
- [Izen](https://modrinth.com/user/MaybeIzen) for creating this Modrinth page.

**Enjoy using Blade 16x**
